name: text-input
description: Form text input with label, helper text, error state, start/end adornments, clear button, character count, and focus ring.

props.name: label
props.description: Floating label text rendered above the input field

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text displayed below the input; hidden when an error is present

props.name: error
props.description: Error message displayed below the input; puts the input in error state

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input and applies disabled styling

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling padding and minimum height

props.name: startAdornment
props.description: Content rendered at the left edge of the input container

props.name: endAdornment
props.description: Content rendered at the right edge of the input container

props.name: clearButton
props.description: When true and the field has text, shows a clear (×) button at the right

props.name: accessibilityHint
props.description: Accessibility hint; overridden by the error message when in error state
